evals.prompt: Write a .tftest.hcl file for this OCI module that checks plan-mode behavior only. I want coverage for server name normalization, explicit compartment aliases, and the reserved public IP mapping, but I do not want a live apply against OCI.
evals.expected_output: An OpenTofu test file that uses tofu test syntax, prefers plan mode, and asserts repository-specific invariants instead of provider-computed IDs.

evals.prompt: I need a regression test for validation failures: a server without a valid compartment alias and another one with an unknown shape profile. Show me how to use expect_failures in OpenTofu so we catch both cases cleanly.
evals.expected_output: A .tftest.hcl example using expect_failures for invalid inputs, written with OpenTofu commands and semantics rather than Terraform-only wording.

evals.prompt: Set up a lightweight CI validation sequence for this repo. I want fmt, init, validate, and tofu test in the right order, with a note explaining why apply-based OCI tests are not the default here.
evals.expected_output: CI or workflow guidance that is OpenTofu-first, uses tofu commands, and explicitly distinguishes low-risk plan-mode tests from expensive live OCI integration tests.
